generated_iso: nāṉ classes-a skip paṇṇāṉāṅka eṉ Physics teacher-kku rompa ciramamillai.
generated: naan classes-a skip pannaanaanga en Physics teacher-kku rompa ciramamillai.

en: You may as well do the task now.
You are responsible for the result.
I would like to give him a present for his birthday.
generated_tamil: அவர birthday-க்கு ஒரு present பண்ண விரும்புறேன்.
generated_iso: avara birthday-kku oru present paṇṇa virumpuṟēṉ.
generated: avara birthday-kku oru present panna virumpuren.

en: You are old enough to behave yourself.
Thanks for your explanation.
Your work is below average.
Back in high school, I got up at 6 a.m. every morning.
generated_tamil: high school-ல இருந்தேன், ஒவ்வொரு morning-அ 6 a.m-ல நான் எழுந்து போறேன்.
generated_iso: high school-la iruntēṉ, ovvoru morning-a 6 a.m-la nāṉ eḻuntu pōṟēṉ.
generated: high school-la irunthen, ovvoru morning-a 6 a.m-la naan ezhunthu poren.

en: You will soon get accustomed to your new school.
generated_tamil: நீங்க சீக்கிரமே உங்கள new school-க்கு accustomed பண்ணும்.
generated_iso: nīṅka cīkkiramē uṅkaḷa new school-kku accustomed paṇṇum.
generated: neenga seekkirame ungala new school-kku accustomed pannum.

en: No one noticed the bear's appearance.
The sky is full of stars.
I have some good news for you.
You have lovely eyes, don't you?
Sven was so verbose that his friends resorted to calling him a chatterbox.
generated_tamil: Sven ரொம்ப verbose-ஆ இருந்தா, அவர chatterbox-ஆ call பண்ணாங்க.
generated_iso: Sven rompa verbose-ā iruntā, avara chatterbox-ā call paṇṇāṅka.
generated: Sven rompa verbose-aa irunthaa, avara chatterbox-aa call pannaanga.

en: Where is the problem?
I wonder if you have something to write with.
It may be that the happiness awaiting us is not at all the sort of happiness we would want.
generated_tamil: நம்ம எதிர்பார்க்கும் happiness-அ நம்ம விரும்பும் happiness-ஆ இருக்க முடியாது.
generated_iso: namma etirpārkkum happiness-a namma virumpum happiness-ā irukka muṭiyātu.
generated: namma ethirpaarkkum happiness-a namma virumpum happiness-aa irukka mudiyaathu.

en: Let's discuss your love problems on the way back from school.
generated_tamil: School-ல இருந்துற வழில உங்க love problems-அ discuss பண்ணுவோம்.
generated_iso: School-la iruntuṟa vaḻila uṅka love problems-a discuss paṇṇuvōm.
generated: School-la irunthura vazhila unga love problems-a discuss pannuvom.

en: You really have a passion for food.
